form.formComment: Mixing form recently. Last start was then recovered to finish third over 1660m at Albion Park last time out. Before that beaten 21 metres, fifth at Marburg over 1850m 3yo+ NR 49 to 54 on April 5. Not keen.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Mixing form recently. Last start was then recovered to finish third over 1660m at Albion Park last time out. Before that beaten 21 metres, fifth at Marburg over 1850m 3yo+ NR 49 to 54 on April 5. Not keen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait as the start was effected, losing valuable ground.

form.formComment: Nine-year-old gelding showed improvement last time. Won by 4 m (Sr4) at this track (2:32.00) beating Smirks Lika Boss in 3yo+ NR 41 to 46 on April 8 at $16. The race before was not as impressive when well beaten into fifth behind Miss Froufrou at Albion Park over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR up to 65 on March 30 at $14. Leaning to others this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Utilized the sprint lane in the run to the finish.
Held up for clear running at a vital stage in the straight.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr4) over 1660m after showing early speed at Albion Park beaten 19 m by Sensationalize (1:55.30) in 4yo+ B 5 NR 55 or better M on April 4 at $51. Before that, 4th (Sr3) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 11 m by Much Bettor (1:57.70) in 3yo+ NR 51 to 57 on March 27 at $12. Well placed and draws to advantage.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for racing room entering leaving the 1200

form.formComment: Only had 3 starts last preparation. Returned to racing with a handy win by 2 m (Sr1) at this track (2:07.60) beating Blackjack Bart in 3yo+ NR 53 to 59 on April 1 at $3.30. Fitter and could go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Only had 3 starts last preparation. Returned to racing with a handy win by 2 m (Sr1) at this track (2:07.60) beating Blackjack Bart in 3yo+ NR 53 to 59 on April 1 at $3.30. Fitter and could go on with it.

form.formComment: Last start 12th (Fr2) over 2138m at Albion Park beaten 60 m by Ozzie Punta (2:30.80) in 4yo+ B 5 NR 55 or better on March 28 at $26. At her previous start 5th (Fr2) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 7 m by Iloveacalendergirl (1:56.50) in 4yo+ No NR M on March 21 at $19. Capable of more than she has shown recently. May be ready to show more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait free of interference near the 800.
Broke gait free of interference approaching the 300.

form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Canadian Lass, a rival who he faces again; when 17 metres fifth at this track over 2040m in a 3yo+ NR 55 to 65 race on April 8. Wait until the form picks up.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr3) over 2138m at Albion Park beaten 8 m by The Rizzler (2:33.30) in 3yo+ NR 51 to 60 on April 7 at $12. Before that, 8th (Sr1) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 13 m by Mardibringsaparty (1:56.60) in 4yo+ NR 50 or better M on March 7 at $6. Among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 5th (Sr3) over 2138m at Albion Park beaten 8 m by The Rizzler (2:33.30) in 3yo+ NR 51 to 60 on April 7 at $12. Before that, 8th (Sr1) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 13 m by Mardibringsaparty (1:56.60) in 4yo+ NR 50 or better M on March 7 at $6. Among the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted wider on the track when placed under pressure inside the 100m.

form.formComment: Five-year-old mare is racing in fine form. Won her last two outings at this track both over 2040m. Last start won by 6 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr2) at this track (2:29.70) beating Ideal Assassin in 3yo+ NR 55 to 65 on April 8 at $2. Draws on the back row but with even luck can make it the hat trick of wins.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 1.75 m second behind The Rizzler at Albion Park over 2138m 3yo+ NR 51 to 60 last start. Before that was beaten 2.75 metres fourth again at Albion Park in 3yo+ NR up to 70 on March 31. Can make his presence felt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked when the pace in the one-wide line was reduced leaving the 1600m.
Restrained at the start to a rearward trailing position.

Broke gait racing toward the first turn.
